notes: Integrated security scanning suite; 5 products; used by NCSA for firewall certification; absorbed into IBM Security in 2006
Intrusion monitoring, detection and warning; real-time packet flow analysis; predecessor to modern SIEM
Universal attack surface; ISS uses TCP/IP as common probe medium across all targets

tech_name: SATAN (Security Administrators Tool for Analyzing Networks)
notes: Free Unix-based network scanner; predecessor/competitor to SAFEsuite; required Unix expertise to build and operate
NT security policies not enforced across network; Microsoft removed security controls from 3.51/4.0 that existed in 3.50
Circuit-filter and proxy-server firewalls; ISS Firewall Scanner tests actual firewall effectiveness
Early VPN deployment alongside stronger authentication; ISS products complement VPNs
